steps.title: Identify the reversal
steps.content: The researchers expected the spiders' rapid spread to result from aggressive behavior, but discovered they are actually gentle and freeze under disturbance—a direct reversal of their initial hypothesis.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: Instead marks this exact reversal: expected aggression, found gentleness. The other options fail to capture this contrast—they suggest confirmation, present the finding as elaboration, or merely restate. That matches choice B — B is correct.
